scrapeStatus: ok (2 processed matches, 2 scorecard calls this run)

striker.method: computed strike rate with minimum 100 runs

bestBowlingFigures.method: best single spell sorted by wickets then runs

bestBowlingStrikeRate.method: computed balls per wicket with minimum 72 balls

mostDots.method: parsed JSONP mostdotballsbowledtournament feed from Sports Mechanic stats feed

mvp.method: custom formula using runs, sixes, wickets, dot balls, catches, strike-rate bonus, economy bonus and milestone bonuses

uncappedMvp.method: filtered to the provided uncapped player pool, then compares picks by their positions in the custom MVP ranking

fairPlay.method: parsed JSONP fairplayTotal table from Sports Mechanic stats feed

leastMvp.method: lower in custom MVP ranking wins, filtered to players with minimum 5 matches

costControl.method: cached completed matches forever, capped backlog catch-up, throttled live scorecards

mvp.formula: Runs + (Sixes×2) + (Wickets×20) + (Dot balls×1.5) + (Catches×8) + batting SR bonus + bowling economy bonus + milestone bonuses

uncappedMvp.source: custom MVP ranking filtered to user-provided uncapped player pool

leastMvp.formulaSource: custom MVP ranking filtered to players with minimum match requirement
